## Checklist

- [ ] Target agent outcomes remain deterministic (no LLM-decided success/failure)
- [ ] Exploit results are proven by real tool-call logs, not assertions
- [ ] Relevant `docs/` plan or to-do updated to match behavior/contract changes
- [ ] Typecheck, lint, and tests pass for the package(s) I touched
- [ ] Full demo (scan + patch + replay) still completes under 90 seconds
